name: @forgeax/engine-geometry
description: Procedural mesh geometry factories + vertex attribute layout SSOT for forgeax-engine.

fps.reason: pure-function geometry library, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps

bench.reason: procedural geometry factories run once at asset-build time, not per-frame; no CI micro-benchmark warranted

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by hello-* / learn-render apps that consume the factories

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; geometry extracted from runtime in feat-20260704-runtime-tier1-decomposition
